---
title: "How are you using Sentinel?"
labels: ["show-and-tell"]
---

## Tell us about your setup

We'd love to see how the community is using Sentinel in real projects!

**Questions to answer (feel free to skip any):**

1. **What type of project are you using Sentinel on?** (e.g., Node.js API, React app, Go microservice, monorepo...)
2. **Which analyzers/features do you use most?**
3. **How have you integrated it?** (Git hooks, GitHub Actions, VS Code extension, CI pipeline...)
4. **What's been the most useful finding it caught?**
5. **Anything you wish it did better?**

Feel free to share config snippets, output screenshots, or workflows!
